hero.title: Zuta Levana Catering
hero.subtitle: An Unforgettable Galilean Culinary Experience by Chef Talia Haltman

about.title: Local Roots, Galilean Flavors
about.text: Zuta Levana is a Galilean boutique catering service based out of Klil, in the Western Galilee. Talia, the executive chef and owner, was born and raised in Klil, where she lives today with her family. Talia brings a rich background in professional culinary arts and baking; she previously owned a boutique bakery and established Zuta Levana Catering in 2024. Catering to private milestones such as weddings, Bar/Bat Mitzvahs, alongside specialized high-end corporate events, Talia's culinary creation centers on seasonal Galilean cooking, sourcing uncompromised local ingredients with flawless delivery.
about.img_alt_talia: Chef Talia preparing fresh artisanal ingredients in the kitchen
about.img_alt_staff: The Zuta Levana kitchen crew preparing for a large gathering
about.img_alt_buffet: A beautifully curated rustic buffet setup at an outdoor event

services.title: Our Culinary Offerings
services.dairy_text: A rich dairy celebration showcasing regional boutique cheeses, hand-stretched crusts, and crisp farm-to-table vegetables. The highlight is our signature open-fire Taboon station, producing live artisanal Neapolitan pizzas, aromatic focaccias, and bubbling stuffed pastries baked directly in front of your guests.
services.meat_text: An uncompromising meat experience combining premium slow-roasted cuts, professional live carving displays, and deeply traditional dishes. The crown jewel of our meat menu is the classic Galilean Mansaf - features aromatic seasoned rice, golden toasted almonds, and tender pulled meat slow-cooked to perfection.
services.corporate_text: Zuta Levana knows how to craft exceptional culinary experiences tailored exactly to the fast-paced needs of tech firms and leading corporate entities. From stylish networking happy hours to dynamic outdoor corporate festivals.
services.dairy_img_alt: Elegant dairy spread with local cheeses and pastries
services.meat_img_alt: Live carving station with premium slow-roasted cuts
services.corporate_img_alt: Refined corporate event with curated culinary design

testimonials.quote: Amazing food that our guests haven't stopped talking about. Talia turned our daughter's Bat Mitzvah into a culinary experience we will never forget!
testimonials.name: Ariel & Neta

testimonials.quote: The Taboon in the courtyard was simply breathtaking. Professional and personal service on another level.
testimonials.name: The Cohen Family

testimonials.quote: Our company event received huge compliments from all employees. Highly recommended!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy & Terms of Use
privacy.body:
Welcome to the Zuta Levana Catering landing page. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information in accordance with the Israeli Privacy Protection Law.

Information collected (name, phone, email) is used solely for initial contact to provide a price quote. Data is stored securely and will not be shared with third parties.

You may contact us at any time to view, correct, or delete your data via WhatsApp.

a11yStatement.title: Accessibility Statement
a11yStatement.body:
Zuta Levana Catering is committed to digital accessibility for all users in accordance with IS 5568 standard and WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines.

Implemented features: dedicated accessibility toolbar, full keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, alternative text for images, and responsive design.

For accessibility inquiries: 0545-696903 or via the WhatsApp button on this site.
